title: Aureline patch-stack and sequence-editor vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the patch-stack and sequence-editor record family frozen in docs/vcs/change_stack_contract.md. One record family pins which ordered, base-pinned, validation-aware sequence of change objects a surface is operating on (patch_stack_record), the per-member ordering / landing-state / validation-staleness row (patch_stack_member_record), the explicit history-edit plan that names a rebase / reword / squash / fixup / drop / exec / break / label / reset / merge_replay intent before any mutation begins (sequence_editor_plan_record), and the per-operation row that pairs the operation class with its target / output change-object refs (sequence_editor_operation_record); two audit streams (patch_stack and sequence_editor) carry the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. The patch-stack base identity is immutable for the stack's life, member ordering is preserved through superseded_by_member_id_ref chains rather than destructively re-ordinaling in place, every plan that admits a mutation cites a non-null recovery_object_ref and a non-null actor_ref / command_id_ref / approval_ticket_ref, and every paused plan resolves through one of the conflict-handoff classes shipped on schemas/vcs/change_object.schema.json. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw run-log bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; the record carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and policy / freshness / authority / lifecycle state only. The eventual change-stack crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, patch_stack_lifecycle_state, patch_stack_member_landing_state, validation_staleness_class, sequence_editor_operation_class, sequence_op_status, sequence_editor_lifecycle_state, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps patch_stack_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

patch_stack_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the patch-stack and sequence-editor vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw run-log bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload. Exporters MUST apply broker-owned redaction (ADR-0007) before the value crosses this boundary.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. ADR-0008 / ADR-0009 policy epoch and ADR-0001 / ADR-0018 trust state are re-validated on every restore and topology-changing mutation.

conflict_handoff_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/vcs/change_object.schema.json. Pairs with merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref and history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref forward-dependency slots.

patch_stack_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen patch-stack lifecycle vocabulary. patch_stack_drafting is the only state in which recovery_object_ref MAY be null; every other state MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_ref. patch_stack_paused_pending_conflict pairs with conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision; patch_stack_paused_pending_history_edit_recovery pairs with history_edit_recovery_packet_required_pending_decision.

patch_stack_member_landing_state.description: Frozen patch-stack-member landing-state vocabulary. member_blocked_pending_conflict_resolution MUST pair with conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision conflict_handoff_class; member_blocked_pending_history_edit_recovery MUST pair with history_edit_recovery_packet_required_pending_decision conflict_handoff_class.

validation_staleness_class.description: Frozen per-stack-member validation freshness vocabulary. The stack-level freshness chip lives on the host record; this row is the per-member parity boundary.

sequence_editor_operation_class.description: Frozen sequence-editor operation class vocabulary. pick / reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / merge_replay MUST cite a target_change_object_id_ref; reword / edit / squash / fixup / merge_replay MUST cite a non-null output_change_object_id_ref once admitted; drop MUST cite a null output_change_object_id_ref; exec / break / label / reset MUST NOT cite a target_change_object_id_ref or an output_change_object_id_ref.

sequence_op_status.description: Frozen per-operation status vocabulary. op_blocked_pending_conflict MUST pair with conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision conflict_handoff_class on the operation row.

sequence_editor_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen sequence-editor plan lifecycle vocabulary. sequence_plan_drafted is the only state in which recovery_object_ref MAY be null; every other state MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_ref or the row denies with sequence_editor_recovery_object_required_before_admission. sequence_plan_aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object MUST cite the recovery object the abort rolled back to (denies with sequence_editor_abort_recovery_object_required); sequence_plan_paused_pending_conflict MUST cite at least one operation whose sequence_op_status is op_blocked_pending_conflict; sequence_plan_paused_pending_user_resolution MUST cite at least one operation that escalated to a history-edit recovery packet.

patch_stack_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the patch_stack audit stream.

patch_stack_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the patch_stack stream. patch_stack_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a patch_stack_denial_reason.

sequence_editor_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the sequence_editor audit stream.

sequence_editor_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the sequence_editor stream. sequence_editor_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a sequence_editor_denial_reason.

base_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the immutable base identity the stack is rooted on. A surface that retargets the stack onto a new base resolves to a fresh patch_stack_record whose recovery_object_ref cites the prior stack; in-place mutation denies with patch_stack_base_identity_must_not_mutate_in_place.

ordered_member_id_refs.description: Ordered list of patch_stack_member_record ids. Ordering is the stack's landing order. Mutating this order is a fresh stack version whose recovery_object_ref pins the prior order; member rows are not destructively re-ordinaled. A duplicate ordinal across two non-superseded member rows in the same stack denies with patch_stack_member_ordinal_uniqueness_required.

recovery_object_ref.description: Opaque ref to the pre-mutation recovery object. Required (non-null) when patch_stack_lifecycle_state is anything other than patch_stack_drafting; nullable on a freshly drafted stack that has not yet admitted a topology-changing mutation.

exported_patch_stack_snapshot_ref.description: Opaque ref to the snapshot the stack was exported through. Required (non-null) when an export_patch_stack_snapshot_for_handoff or export_side_branch_for_collaborator_review action has been emitted against the stack; null otherwise.

imported_from_patch_stack_snapshot_ref.description: Opaque ref to the snapshot the stack was imported from. Required (non-null) when the stack was hydrated through an import_patch_stack_snapshot_from_handoff action; null otherwise.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket row admitting the most recent topology-changing mutation. Required (non-null) on rollback / export actions.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the command-dispatch id under which the most recent mutation was invoked. Nullable on system-driven row mints; required (non-null) on rollback / export actions.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when patch_stack_lifecycle_state is patch_stack_archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge / conflict-class contract. Currently always null.

history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the dedicated history-edit recovery contract. Currently always null.

allOf.description: Every patch_stack_lifecycle_state other than patch_stack_drafting MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_ref; a missing ref denies with patch_stack_recovery_object_required_before_topology_change.
patch_stack_archived_tombstone MUST cite a non-null archived_at and MUST be null otherwise.

patch_stack_record.description: Row shape consumed by the patch-stack panel, the AI branch-agent review surface, the sequence-editor plan view, the import / export wizard, support / export, and audit lanes. Exactly one row per patch-stack identity.

ordinal.description: Zero-based ordinal preserving the stack's landing order. A surface that mutates ordinals destructively in place denies with patch_stack_member_silent_reorder_forbidden; the legal path is to mint a fresh member row whose superseded_by_member_id_ref cites the prior row.

superseded_by_member_id_ref.description: Required (non-null) when patch_stack_member_landing_state is member_superseded_by_member_rewrite; cites the successor member row in the same stack. Null otherwise.

recovery_object_ref.description: Opaque ref to the pre-mutation recovery object pinned before this member row was admitted. Required (non-null) when patch_stack_member_landing_state is member_dropped_explicit_user_action, member_superseded_by_member_rewrite, member_blocked_pending_conflict_resolution, or member_blocked_pending_history_edit_recovery.

allOf.description: member_superseded_by_member_rewrite MUST cite a non-null superseded_by_member_id_ref and a non-null recovery_object_ref so the rewrite chain remains reversible.
member_dropped_explicit_user_action MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_ref so the drop is reversible.

patch_stack_member_record.description: Row shape consumed by the patch-stack panel and the sequence-editor plan view. Exactly one row per stack member version; rewrite chains travel through superseded_by_member_id_ref.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when patch_stack_audit_event_id_value is patch_stack_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is patch_stack_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

patch_stack_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the patch_stack stream.

target_patch_stack_id_ref.description: Required (non-null) when the sequence edit operates on a known patch stack; null when the edit operates on a single branch with no stack overlay.

ordered_operation_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to sequence_editor_operation_record rows in the order they will execute.

recovery_object_ref.description: Required (non-null) when sequence_editor_lifecycle_state is anything other than sequence_plan_drafted; nullable only on a fresh draft. A plan that admits an operation without citing a recovery object denies with sequence_editor_recovery_object_required_before_admission.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Required (non-null) when sequence_editor_lifecycle_state is anything other than sequence_plan_drafted. Nullable only on a fresh draft; a missing ticket once admitted denies with sequence_editor_attribution_missing.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when sequence_editor_lifecycle_state is sequence_plan_archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge / conflict-class contract. Currently always null.

history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the dedicated history-edit recovery contract. Currently always null.

allOf.description: Every sequence_editor_lifecycle_state other than sequence_plan_drafted MUST cite a non-null recovery_object_ref and a non-null approval_ticket_ref; a missing ref denies with sequence_editor_recovery_object_required_before_admission or sequence_editor_attribution_missing.
sequence_plan_aborted_rolled_back_to_recovery_object MUST cite the recovery object the abort rolled back to; a missing ref denies with sequence_editor_abort_recovery_object_required.
sequence_plan_archived_tombstone MUST cite a non-null archived_at and MUST be null otherwise.

sequence_editor_plan_record.description: Row shape consumed by the sequence-editor plan view. Exactly one row per history-edit plan.

ordinal.description: Zero-based ordinal preserving the plan's operation order.

target_change_object_id_ref.description: Required (non-null) for pick / reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / merge_replay; null for exec / break / label / reset. A row that mismatches the table denies with sequence_editor_operation_target_or_output_mismatch.

output_change_object_id_ref.description: Required (non-null) on admitted / completed reword / edit / squash / fixup / merge_replay operations whose synthesized output is a fresh change_object_record with class change_synthesized_during_history_edit. Null on drop / exec / break / label / reset.

allOf.description: pick / reword / edit / squash / fixup / drop / merge_replay MUST cite a non-null target_change_object_id_ref.
exec / break / label / reset MUST NOT cite a target_change_object_id_ref or an output_change_object_id_ref.
drop MUST cite a null output_change_object_id_ref.
Completed reword / edit / squash / fixup / merge_replay MUST cite a non-null output_change_object_id_ref.

sequence_editor_operation_record.description: Row shape consumed by the sequence-editor plan view. Exactly one row per history-edit operation.

sequence_editor_operation_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the operation this audit event names (set on sequence_editor_operation_* event ids; null on plan-level events).

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when sequence_editor_audit_event_id_value is sequence_editor_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is sequence_editor_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

sequence_editor_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the sequence_editor stream.
